user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Samsung
Product type: Galaxy S25 Ultra smartphone
Tone: innovative, premium, cutting-edge
Visual style: Sleek, futuristic visuals with a focus on high-tech details and vibrant, dynamic lighting to emphasize advanced features.
Conceptual technique: technology-driven experiential storytelling
Format: image

brief.visual_style: Sleek, futuristic visuals with a focus on high-tech details and vibrant, dynamic lighting to emphasize advanced features
brief.headline: Experience the Future in Your Hands
brief.body_copy: Introducing the Galaxy S25 Ultra — where innovation meets elegance. Powered by cutting-edge technology, its ultra-responsive display, revolutionary camera system, and seamless AI integration redefine what a smartphone can do. Step into a world beyond imagination.
brief.call_to_action: Discover the Galaxy S25 Ultra today.

visual_direction.composition: Center the Galaxy S25 Ultra smartphone prominently with its screen glowing dynamically, surrounded by holographic data streams and futuristic cityscape elements blending into the background.
visual_direction.color_palette: Use a palette of deep blacks, electric blues, and vibrant neon accents to create a high-tech ambiance.
visual_direction.lighting: Employ vibrant, dynamic lighting highlighting the phone’s contours and high-tech details, creating reflections and depth.
visual_direction.textures: Incorporate sleek metal and glass textures to emphasize premium quality.
visual_direction.imagery: Include subtle holographic UI elements floating around the device to suggest advanced features and AI capabilities.
